mode.title: Scraper Mode
mode.description: Choose what to scrape: search notes by keyword, get note details, get user profile, or extract comments

keyword.title: Search Keyword
keyword.description: Keyword to search for (used in search mode)

noteUrl.title: Note URL
noteUrl.description: Full URL of a Xiaohongshu note (used in note/comments mode)

userId.title: User ID
userId.description: Xiaohongshu user ID (used in user mode)

userUrl.title: User URL
userUrl.description: Full URL of a Xiaohongshu user profile (used in user mode)

limit.title: Result Limit
limit.description: Maximum number of results to return
